# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

class AdminDashboard {
    public function __construct() {}

    private $conn;

    public function connect() {
        try {
            $this->conn = new PDO('mysql:host=localhost;dbname=yourdatabase', 'username', 'password');
            return true;
        } catch (PDOException $e) {
            echo "Connection failed: " . $e->getMessage();
            return false;
        }
    }

    public function generateReport() {
        if ($this->connect()) {
            extract($_POST);
            $conditions = array();

            if (!empty($status)) {
                $conditions[] = 'p.status = "' . $status . '"';
            }

            if (!empty($category)) {
                $conditions[] = 'p.category = "' . $category . '"';
            }

            if ($start_date && $end_date) {
                $conditions[] = "p.date BETWEEN '$start_date' AND '$end_date'";
            } elseif ($start_date) {
                $conditions[] = "p.date >= '$start_date'";
            } elseif ($end_date) {
                $conditions[] = "p.date <= '$end_date'";
            }

            if (count($conditions) > 0) {
                $sql = 'SELECT p.*, c.category_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category=c.id WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
            } else {
                $sql = 'SELECT p.* FROM products p';
            }

            try {
                $stmt = $this->conn->prepare($sql);
                if ($start_date && $end_date) {
                    $stmt->bindParam(':start_date', $start_date, PDO::PARAM_STR);
                    $stmt->bindParam(':end_date', $end_date, PDO::PARAM_STR);
                }
                if (!empty($status)) {
                    $stmt->bindParam(':status', $status, PDO::PARAM_STR);
                }
                if (!empty($category)) {
                    $stmt->bindParam(':category', $category, PDO::PARAM_STR);
                }
                $stmt->execute();
                return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
            } catch (PDOException $e) {
                echo "Error generating report: " . $e->getMessage();
                return null;
            }
        }
    }
}

// Initialize the class
$admin_dashboard = new AdminDashboard();

// Process POST data and generate report
if (!empty($_POST)) {
    $result = $admin_dashboard->generateReport();
    if ($result) {
        echo json_encode($result);
    } else {
        echo 'Error generating report';
    }
}
